creator: lwhsu@lwhsu.org
text:
This package is now part of Python 2.3.
(From: http://www.red-dove.com/python_logging.html )

Thus it should be ignored when the PYTHON_REL resolves to a value >= 230.

Bumped PORTREVISION to note users about that change.

Port maintainer (perky@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
